noapplications.title: noapplications
noapplications.description: Indicates that no loan applications were found for the provided user.

resultMessage.title: resultMessage
resultMessage.description: Provides a summary message about the loan status query result.

singleApplicationStatus.title: singleApplicationStatus
singleApplicationStatus.description: Displays the status of a single loan application (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected).
